title: Replace QR code image with newly uploaded Luminia Gadgets QR (image-9.png)

requirements.text: Replace the existing QR code image at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png with the newly uploaded QR code image (image-9.png) showing the Luminia Gadgets Google Pay QR code linked to Bank of Baroda 1897 with UPI ID luminiagadgets@okicici.

quotes: this is the qr code just paste it there with the upi id

acceptanceCriteria: The file at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png is replaced with the content of image-9.png.
The QR code image displayed in PaymentSection.tsx (after the customer clicks 'Proceed to Pay') shows the new Luminia Gadgets QR code.
The UPI ID displayed in PaymentSection.tsx reads 'luminiagadgets@okicici'.
The QR code image remains properly centered on all screen sizes.

constraints: Do not change the two-step payment flow logic in PaymentSection.tsx.
Do not alter the WhatsApp redirect or UTE reference number generation logic.
nonGoals: Changing any other payment flow behavior.
Modifying any section other than the QR code asset and UPI ID display.

edits: Replace with the uploaded Luminia Gadgets Google Pay QR screenshot showing Bank of Baroda 1897 and UPI ID luminiagadgets@okicici (image-9.png > google-pay-qr.dim_600x600.png)
